{{Quote|These days, they let practically anyone with a ticket-chip on board.|Tyew Fordrod|<ref name="Riders of the Maelstrom">[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']]</ref>}}
The '''Polosich''' were a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] [[Species/Legends|species]] with velvety skin of [[Color/Legends|yellow]] pigmentation. [[Tyew Fordrod]] was a Polosich living during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Fordrod was traveling aboard the [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']], a giant [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]], on a cruise up the [[Relgim Run/Legends|Relgim Run]] when it was [[Attack on the Kuari Princess|attacked]] by [[Riders of the Maelstrom|pirates]] while passing through [[Maelstrom Nebula/Legends|the Maelstrom]]. Fordrod had booked accommodation on the [[Lido Deck]] and considered himself superior to anyone who traveled on less expensive decks.<ref name="RM" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Polosich were created by [[Ray Winninger]] for the ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]'' adventure, [[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']], published by [[West End Games]] in [[1989]].<ref name="RM" />

==Appearances==
*[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']] {{Reprint|Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)}} {{1st}}
